系统与调度优化: Expert parallelism has emerged as a key strategy for distributing the computational workload of sparsely-gated mixture-of-experts (MoE) models across multiple devices, enabling the processing of increasingly large-scale models.
However, the All-to-All communication inherent to expert parallelism poses a significant bottleneck, limiting the efficiency of MoE models.
Although existing optimization methods partially mitigate this issue, they remain constrained by the sequential dependency between communication and computation operations.

notes: Assuming the proposed shortcut-connected expert parallelism addresses the communication/computation scheduling bottleneck described in the abstract, which constitutes the core system/scheduling optimization contribution.

general: LoRA-Mixer routes task-specific LoRA experts into attention projection matrices, giving token-level specialization while remaining drop-in compatible.

系统与调度优化: Hard–soft top-k routing and RSL enforce load balance and selective expert reuse, shaping routers for adaptive token scheduling.

notes: Modular router reuses public LoRA modules, cutting trainable parameters to 48% while outperforming routing and LoRA-MoE baselines.

general: Graph neural networks have shown promising results in weather forecasting, which is critical for human activity such as agriculture planning and extreme weather preparation.

general: Time series forecasting plays a significant role ... we propose a novel Semantic-Enhanced LLM (SE-LLM) that explores the inherent periodicity and anomalous characteristics of time series to embed into the semantic space to enhance the token embedding.

Existing Transformer-based LLMs excel at capturing long-range dependencies but are weak at modeling short-term anomalies ... we propose a plugin module embedded within self-attention that models long-term and short-term dependencies ... Our approach freezes the LLM and reduces the sequence dimensionality of tokens, greatly reducing computational consumption.

notes: The paper’s core contribution is a self-attention plugin and semantic token embedding enhancements for LLM inference on time series, qualifying as a structure-oriented inference optimization.

general: Sparse RAG encodes retrieved documents in parallel and only attends to highly relevant caches when decoding, reducing the number of documents loaded during decoding and cutting the computation cost of retrieval-augmented inference.
上下文与缓存优化: The sparse mechanism filters out undesirable contexts and speeds up RAG inference by limiting attention to selected caches, thereby reducing the context the model must load during decoding and sharpening focus on relevant information.

notes: Sparse RAG focuses on selecting and attending to a small subset of retrieved caches to accelerate and improve inference quality.

general: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) have demonstrated impressive performance across a versatile set of tasks. A key challenge in accelerating VLMs is storing and accessing the large Key-Value (KV) cache that encodes long visual contexts.
We propose VL-Cache, a novel KV cache compression recipe tailored for accelerating VLM inference, investigating sparsity patterns and introducing layer-adaptive cache budget allocation.
上下文与缓存优化: We introduce a layer-adaptive sparsity-aware cache budget allocation method that effectively distributes the limited cache budget across different layers, further reducing KV cache size without compromising accuracy.

A modality-aware token scoring policy better evaluates token importance; retaining only 10% of KV cache achieves accuracy comparable to that with full cache while reducing GPU memory footprint by 90%.

general: Paper focuses on out-of-distribution detection using intermediate layers of pre-trained vision transformers and an entropy-based layer selection method to boost confidence-based detection without retraining.

general: Introduces a dataset of 788,984 AI-written peer reviews paired with human reviews covering 8 years of submissions to ICLR and NeurIPS to benchmark AI text detection.

上下文与缓存优化: Efficient generative inference in LLMs is impeded by the growing memory demands of Key-Value (KV) cache, especially for longer sequences ... notes: D₂O optimizes KV cache eviction without fine-tuning, achieving significant memory savings and >3× throughput improvements on long-context inference benchmarks.

general: The increasing demand for long-context generation has made the KV cache in large language models a bottleneck in memory consumption.
We propose PolarQuant ... provides a new perspective for key cache quantization and efficiently addresses the outlier dilemma.
上下文与缓存优化: PolarQuant divides key vectors into groups of two-dimensional sub-vectors, encoding them as the quantized radius and the polar angle, rather than quantizing original key vectors directly.
PolarQuant achieves superior efficiency in KV cache quantization and accelerates the decoding process by turning the query-key inner product into a table lookup.

notes: Paper introduces PolarQuant to quantize the LLM KV cache, reducing memory cost while accelerating decoding, so it qualifies as a cache/context optimization effort.

上下文与缓存优化: Transformer-based large language models cache context as key-value pairs, and growing context lengths expand KV cache sizes, raising memory overhead and attention latency.
KVzip is a query-agnostic KV cache eviction method that reconstructs original contexts to quantify KV importance, then evicts low-importance pairs to compress the cache.

notes: ['Query-agnostic cache reconstruction is evaluated across multiple LLMs and long contexts, showing 3–4× cache size reduction with ~2× FlashAttention latency speedup.']

general: Speculative decoding methods have recently shown promise in accelerating inference without compromising the output distribution.
We introduce a novel polybasic speculative decoding framework, underpinned by a comprehensive theoretical analysis, to optimize multi-model token generation and computational cost.
解码策略优化: Inference latency stands as a critical bottleneck in the deployment of LLMs, and speculative decoding is presented as the core method to accelerate inference.
Our theoretical investigation exposes and optimizes the interaction between model capabilities, acceptance lengths, and computational cost within a polybasic speculative decoding system.

notes: 核心贡献是构建多模型的 polybasic speculative decoding 理论框架，以提升 LLM 推理速度。

general: 论文通过引入 Lookahead Reasoning，在长链 CoT 推理的 LLM 解码端添加 step-level speculative decoding，直接瞄准 LLM 的 autoregressive 解码瓶颈来提升并行度和吞吐。([ar5iv.org](https://ar5iv.org/pdf/2506.19830))
解码策略优化: Lookahead Reasoning 由草稿模型并行生成未来 reasoning steps，再用 verifier 校验并接受多个步骤，整个流程直接改变 token/step 的生成与验证顺序，并与 token-level speculative decoding 叠加，加速解码策略。([ar5iv.org](https://ar5iv.org/pdf/2506.19830))

notes: 论文在 GSM8K、AIME 等基准上展示与 token-level SD 组合后将 speedup 从 1.4x 推升到 2.1x，同时保持答案质量，说明主方法集中在 speculative decoding 的解码策略优化上。([ar5iv.org](https://ar5iv.org/pdf/2506.19830))

general: Direct Preference Optimization (DPO) is a widely used preference optimization algorithm in large language model (LLM) alignment, which reparameterizes the reward function in reinforcement learning with human feedback (RLHF)...

During the DPO training process, when a large negative gradient is applied to low-confidence samples, LLMs with a softmax output head tend to squeeze the confidence in the model's output distribution towards the highest-confidence sentence, which may lead to a decrease in the confidence of both preference and non-preference samples, while increasing the confidence of unrelated tokens.

notes: Paper diagnoses DPO gradient behavior for LLM preference alignment without proposing a new serving/system or kernel/decoding/cache optimization.

general: Title and abstract focus on improving counterfactual reasoning in large language models through data generation, supervised finetuning, and reinforcement learning rather than proposing any of the six supporting optimizations.
Mixture of Experts inference suffers from the Straggler Effect, where imbalanced token-to-expert assignment lets the most burdened experts dictate overall latency.

general: ThinKV is a thought-adaptive KV cache compression framework that adapts token precision and evicts less critical tokens to manage the KV cache growth caused by long-output reasoning models.

notes: Main contribution is a knowledge-editing framework for LLMs rather than an optimization belonging to the listed preference labels.

general: We present GOATex, a diffusion-based method for 3D mesh texturing that generates high-quality textures for both exterior and interior surfaces and operates entirely without costly fine-tuning of a pretrained diffusion model.

general: Abstract frames the contribution as accelerating inference for offloaded large language models on memory-limited GPUs via speculative decoding and substitute low-bit layers, confirming the primary object is LLMs. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.18344))

([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.18344))

notes: Training-free substitute speculative decoding for offloaded LLMs delivers reported 9.1×–12.5× speedups while preserving accuracy. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2509.18344))

general: Introduces a framework for validating LLM-as-a-judge systems under rating indeterminacy and compares validation approaches across human–judge agreement metrics, elicitation, and aggregation schemes.
Experiments on 11 real-world rating tasks and 9 commercial LLMs show forced-choice validations select judge systems up to 31% worse than the proposed multi-label response set method.

notes: Focuses on evaluation methodology for judge LLMs rather than optimization of inference, serving, or kernel layers.

Open Proof Corpus (OPC) is a dataset comprising over 5,000 human-evaluated proofs produced by state-of-the-art LLMs and designed for broad applicability in proof generation research, including problems from USAMO and IMO.

The work highlights OPC as the first large dataset of LLM-generated mathematical proofs and shows its utility by fine-tuning an 8B-parameter model to match Gemini-2.5-Pro and approach GPT-5 in proof correctness evaluation.

notes: Dataset paper focused on providing human-evaluated proof data and analyzing gaps in LLM proof generation rather than proposing a systems/optimization method.

general: Title/abstract describe Majority-of-the-Bests (MoB), a bootstrapped selection mechanism that estimates the output distribution of Best-of-N and picks its mode rather than highest reward.
解码策略优化: MoB changes the inference-selection process by estimating BoN’s distribution and choosing the most likely candidate, making selection strategy the core contribution.

notes: Inference-time selection change for Best-of-N rather than system, data, or compressive optimizations.

general: Autoregressive decoding is bottlenecked by its sequential nature; speculative decoding uses a fast draft model to predict upcoming tokens and verifies them in parallel with the target model.
解码策略优化: Speculative speculative decoding (SSD) parallelizes speculation and verification by predicting likely verification outcomes while verification is ongoing, allowing immediately returning speculations when predictions match and eliminating speculation overhead.

notes: SSD/Saguaro directly targets decoding strategy by overlapping verification and speculation to remove sequential bottlenecks.

general: Serving large language models (LLMs) at scale necessitates efficient key-value (KV) cache management, so we introduce KVTC, a lightweight transform coder that compresses KV caches for compact on-GPU and off-GPU storage.

KVTC exploits redundancies in KV caches, combining PCA-based feature decorrelation, adaptive quantization, and entropy coding to achieve up to 20x compression while keeping reasoning and long-context accuracy across Llama 3.1, Mistral-NeMo, and R1-Qwen 2.5 and outperforming inference-time baselines such as token eviction, quantization, and SVD-based methods.

notes: KV cache compression is the core method validated, making context/cache optimization the single strongest labeled contribution.

general: Title and abstract present a position paper arguing for unified physical and social predictive capabilities in world models without proposing a concrete optimization lever.

notes: Conceptual roadmap rather than a specific implementation, so no preference label applies.

general: Reinforcement learning (RL) is crucial for aligning Vision-Language Models (VLMs), but its practical application is hampered by significant system-level bottlenecks.
系统与调度优化: The typical RL pipeline, encompassing data loading, inference-based rollouts, and model updates, suffers from severe inefficiencies when applied to VLMs due to the extreme heterogeneity of multimodal data, leaving expensive GPU resources underutilized.
Existing systems either focus on text-only RL or employ general load-balancing techniques that are incompatible with the small-batch, iterative nature of RL training.

notes: Optimizes load balancing and data-loading bottlenecks specific to VLM RL pipelines.

general: GateSkip introduces per-branch sigmoid-linear residual-stream gates that compress outputs before re-entering the residual stream, enabling token-wise layer skipping.
解码策略优化: During inference we rank tokens by the gate and skip low-importance ones using a per-layer budget, yielding adaptive compute savings while retaining accuracy.

notes: GateSkip fine-tunes pretrained decoder-only models with differentiable gates to skip layers selectively at inference time, keeping quality while cutting compute and complementing other compression techniques.

general: The paper focuses on novel-view synthesis for dynamic scenes using video diffusion (CogNVS) trained on in-the-wild videos and applied via test-time finetuning, rather than infrastructure or optimization tooling.
negative: Abstract outlines a reconstruction+diffusion inpainting pipeline and does not claim any of the six specified optimization levers as its core contribution.

notes: Primary goal is advancing dynamic novel-view synthesis with diffusion-based modeling, so no evidence supports the specified optimization labels.

general: Privacy-preserving gateway mediates third-party LLM prompts, anonymizes sensitive data, interacts securely with LLMs, and reconstructs responses within attested encrypted memory.
Materials science text mining (MSTM) ... we propose MatDuck, a simple and effective approach for Zero-Shot MSTM by evoking material knowledge within Large Language Models (LLMs).
negative: MatDuck centers on descriptor generation and code-style in-context learning for zero-shot tasks, with no new decoding, caching, kernel, system scheduling, or compression optimizations described.

notes: No single preferred optimization lever from the specified six labels is present.

general: High-resolution Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are widely used... Processing such a large number of visual tokens poses significant computational challenges, particularly for resource-constrained commodity GPUs.
上下文与缓存优化: We propose High-Resolution Early Dropping (HiRED), a plug-and-play token-dropping method designed to operate within a fixed token budget... leverage the attention of the CLS token in the vision transformer (ViT) to assess the visual content of the image partitions and allocate an optimal token budget for each partition accordingly, selecting the most informative visual tokens from each partition within the allocated budget and passing them to the subsequent Large Language Model (LLM).

notes: HiRED explicitly drops less-informative visual tokens under a tight budget, so the authors focus on token/attention budget management rather than serving, decoding, or kernel-specific efforts.

general: 摘要指出为处理超高清多曝光动态图像而切分长序列输入，并采用 attention cache 再压缩缓存，目的在资源有限的单张 GPU 上高效完成任务。
上下文与缓存优化: 摘要提到“attention cache technique, which is similar to the KV cache for infinite data stream processing”并进一步提到“attention cache compression to alleviate the storage burden”，说明主要优化焦点在上下文/缓存机制。

notes: 核心贡献是通过 sliced inputs 与 attention cache（含压缩）降低长上下文处理的负担，符合上下文与缓存优化。

general: 标题和摘要指出该工作针对大型多模态模型中的视觉 token 数量进行压缩/恢复，表明研究对象为直接操控视觉 token 的跨模态模型。
上下文与缓存优化: 摘要描述“动态视觉 token 恢复机制”通过文本信息识别并保留重要视觉 token，同时合并无关 token，使视觉 token 数量压缩至原始平均 10%，即通过上下文/缓存机制优化 token 管理。

notes: 方法围绕问句与视觉 token 的相似性动态恢复重要 token，实现不需训练的视觉 token 压缩。

general: Title and abstract describe VPNs framework that uses customized Visual Prompts to upgrade neural network sparsification for vision models and explores data-model co-design for pruning.
模型压缩: Abstract emphasizes joint optimization of prompt-conditioned inputs and model topology to promote superior weight sparsity, showing VPNs outperform state-of-the-art pruning algorithms and transfer better across vision datasets.

general: “Real-time Monte Carlo ray tracing with low sampling rates demands a denoising algorithm… Previous works… ignoring model compression. In this work, we present a render-aware knowledge distillation (RAKD) framework… these approaches are combined to distill knowledge effectively, enabling our student model to adeptly strike a balance between preserving high-frequency details and reducing low-frequency noise… RAKD achieves state-of-the-art quality while upholding real-time performance, successfully tackling the computational constraints faced by resource-limited devices.”

notes: KD-based compression is the main optimization lever for meeting resource-constrained denoising performance.

general: Title and abstract describe a neural feature-based texture compression pipeline prioritizing variable bitrate quantization of multi-resolution blocks for rendering quality; no indication the authors optimize decoding policies, context/caching, systems/scheduling, kernels, or model-side compression in the six-label taxonomy.

notes: Paper centers on texture representation compression in the vision domain, so no preferred optimization label applies; output signals the assessment with documented reasoning.

general: Dynamic quantization has attracted rising attention in image super-resolution (SR) as it expands the potential of heavy SR models onto mobile devices while preserving competitive performance.
模型压缩: Granular-DQ develops a granularity-bit controller that allocates patch-wise, layer-invariant bit-widths and a soft gate for fine-grained dynamic bit adaption, balancing SR accuracy and quantization efficiency.

general: Title/abstract describe learning-based image super-resolution tailored to real-time computer graphics workloads, situating the work within computer vision.

No mention of the six specified optimization pivots such as decoding strategy, caching/context, system scheduling, operator/kernel work, structural inference tweaks, or model compression, so none can be confidently assigned.

notes: Based solely on the provided title/abstract, no single listed preference label can be justified; the focus is on lightweight SR for CG rendering rather than the six specialized optimization targets.

general: Title/abstract describe knowledge-maintenance pruning and progressive recovery methods for a large vision-language model, confirming the LVLM focus.

general: RetouchGPT 利用 LLM 结合文本与视觉特征引导交互式面部润色，重点在生成效果与用户交互而非系统或推理优化。
摘要描述指令驱动的瑕疵预测模块、多模态 embedding 以及逐层 prompt-based 特征修改，未提出五个偏好标签对应的优化杠杆。

notes: 主要在多模态交互润色、瑕疵提示与特征替换，未涉及上下文缓存/系统/算子/结构/压缩/解码等优化方法。

general: 摘要集中在 transformer-based 增量目标检测中将定位与识别过程重新划分、利用语义知识稳固识别表示，未描述作者在解码策略/上下文缓存/系统调度/算子/结构/模型压缩方面的主要优化。

general: ST3通过逐层去除注意力不集中的视觉 token（PVTP）并随着生成 token 增多动态减少每层的视觉 token（VTA），显著降低推理时间与 KV cache 内存开销，使得预训练的 LLaVA 可即插即用地高效推理。
上下文与缓存优化: PVTP在多层中剔除不显著的视觉 token，VTA在生成过程中动态压缩每层 token 数量，最终带来约 2 倍推理加速与仅 30% 的 KV cache 内存占用。

notes: ['论文核心在视觉 token 选择与 KV cache 压缩以减少上下文/注意力成本，故首选上下文与缓存优化。']

general: 提出 Output-adaptive Calibration (OAC) 将模型输出纳入校准过程，基于输出交叉熵损失构造量化误差，并在合理假设下近似输出自适应 Hessian 以降低计算复杂度。
模型压缩: OAC 使用输出自适应的 Hessian 更新权重矩阵并检测关键权重，从而保持模型输出，在极低精度（如 2-bit 和二值）量化下优于 SpQR 与 BiLLM 等最新 baselines。

notes: OAC 的主干仍是 post-training quantization 里优化权重更新和敏感度识别，因此主标签为模型压缩。

general: Title/abstract explain MPQ-DM as mixed-precision quantization for diffusion models to run under extremely low bit-widths (2-4 bits) and recover accuracy while reducing computation/storage.
模型压缩: Abstract describes Outlier-Driven Mixed Quantization (OMQ) and Time-Smoothed Relation Distillation (TRD) specifically for low-bit quantization, claiming significant accuracy/FID improvements compared to other quantization methods.

notes: MPQ-DM focuses on quantizing diffusion parameters (bit-width allocation + distillation) to restore accuracy under aggressive compression; this is why the classification is 生成模型 + 模型压缩.

general: MPTM策略评估多模态prompt与token的接近关系，用于删除冗余token并保留关键信息，显著降低生成图像任务的计算成本。
上下文与缓存优化: Token merging在现代promptable设计中压缩token数量，减少注意力机制的计算开销，提升吞吐率，同时保持输出质量。

general: Abstract describes BigMac as a novel MoE structure that swaps the prior CDAC communication pattern for a DCCA design, adding descending/ascending projections and restructured small experts to shift communication to a lower dimension and keep quality while boosting training/inference efficiency, so it directly targets LLM MoE inference/training throughput without adding systems-only layers or kernels. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.16927))

notes: Experiments report up to 3.09× lower training latency and 3.11× higher inference throughput on Megatron/Tutel/DeepSpeed-Inference, confirming the structural change improves MoE LLM throughput. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2502.16927))

general: SVS refines pruned weights for generative models such as StyleGAN2/3 and DDPM to improve compression performance across GAN and Diffusion models.
模型压缩: The method minimizes disparities between singular values of pruned weights, guiding compressed models toward better fine-tuning and speeding up compression without extra training.

notes: ['Focus is on pruned-weight refinement for generative-model compression.']

general: Title and abstract describe RILQ as a LoRA-based quantization error compensation method for improving 2-bit LLM accuracy, so the study optimizes compressed LLM inference.
模型压缩: Abstract explains RILQ uses low-rank adapters to adjust quantization error compensation across layers and enables adapter-merged weight-quantized LLM inference with much better accuracy than existing LoRA methods in 2-bit settings.

notes: RILQ targets quantization error compensation on LoRA-adapted LLMs to boost sub-4-bit inference accuracy while keeping LoRA-like efficiency.

模型压缩: This paper focuses on compressing decoder-only transformer-based autoregressive models through structural weight pruning to improve the model efficiency while preserving performance for both language and image generation tasks and proposes a training-free pruning method plus a compensation algorithm to recover the pruned model.

notes: Structural weight pruning and recovery are applied directly to decoder-only autoregressive models to reduce memory use and speed up generation, so the core contribution is model compression.

general: ScaleOT’s abstract explains that offsite tuning protects privacy by compressing LLM layers through a layerwise lossy compression algorithm combined with harmonizers, and adds rank reduction to further shrink the original layers while keeping utility nearly intact.
模型压缩: The core method is a layerwise lossy compression algorithm that learns each layer’s importance via reinforcement learning, replaces layers with harmonizers, and applies rank reduction to compress the LLM layers and improve privacy.

notes: 摘要明确将主要贡献定位在压缩原始 LLM 层以提升隐私和效用的平衡。

general: Encoding time series into tokens and using language models for processing has been shown to substantially augment the models' ability to generalize to unseen tasks.

notes: Insufficient detail in the title/abstract to identify a specific optimization preference label.

general: Quantization algorithms can effectively compress LLMs and accelerate inference, but they lead to loss in precision, especially in low-bit scenarios.

To excavate those hidden treasures, we construct search spaces around these discarded weights and those weights within the search space can seamlessly be incorporated into the original quantization weights.
模型压缩: In this paper, we find that the discarded weight values caused by quantization in fact contain treasures to improve LLMs' accuracy, and we design a plug-and-play weight compensation framework to capture global information and keep the weights with the highest potential benefits.
Our framework can be combined with various LLM quantization algorithms to achieve higher precision without additional inference overhead.

notes: The work treats discarded quantized weights as compensations to enhance LLM precision, so the core lever is model compression.

general: Post-training quantization (PTQ) is highlighted as the path to accelerate LLM inference, and ABQ-LLM introduces an arbitrary-bit quantization algorithm and inference framework targeting LLMs such as LLaMA-7B.
模型压缩: Key innovations are distribution correction, bit balance, and a BTC-based quantization acceleration framework that reconstructs arbitrary precision matrix multiplication, turning each component bit-width reduction into real acceleration and memory gains.

notes: Focused on quantization-driven compression plus inference speedup for LLMs, so only the model compression preference applies.

模型压缩: Channel Merging merges similar channel parameters offline to reduce conflicts and storage, allowing performance comparable to ensembling with 53% parameters.

notes: Channel Merging directly compresses merged LLM experts by fusing channels, so the core contribution is parameter reduction rather than caching or scheduling.

general: Quantization stands as a pivotal technique for large language model (LLM) serving … achieving effective low-bit quantization.
ASER … introduces Error Reconstruction and Activation Smoothing to preserve accuracy in W4A8 per-channel quantization.
模型压缩: ASER is capable of quantizing typical LLMs to low-bit ones, particularly preserving accuracy even in W4A8 per-channel setup.

notes: ASER learns LoRA-style low-rank compensation and activation smoothing to reduce post-training quantization error for large LLMs.

general: Dynamic Operator Optimization (Dop) dynamically optimizes the Segmented Gather Matrix-Vector Multiplication (SGMV) operator to improve multi-tenant LoRA inference throughput.
算子与内核优化: Dop builds a Search Space Constructor plus an Optimization Engine that iteratively refines SGMV implementations via evolutionary search and a cost model so the operator adapts to different scenarios and maintains high performance.

notes: Operator-level optimization for multi-tenant LoRA serving is the main validated contribution.

解码策略优化: Title/abstract describe Falcon as a semi-autoregressive speculative decoding framework with a Custom-Designed Decoding Tree that drafts multiple tokens per forward pass to increase acceptance rate and speed up LLM inference.

notes: Falcon targets LLM inference by enhancing speculative decoding accuracy and parallel drafting, yielding 2.91×‑3.51× lossless speedup on Vicuna and LLaMA2-Chat series.

general: title=Multi-Branch Self-Drafting for LLM Inference Acceleration

abstract=To mitigate these constraints, we propose a multi-branch drafting procedure that efficiently generates draft sequences during decoding without extra models or training, boosting throughput by generating 2.0 to 3.2 tokens per forward step
解码策略优化: abstract=extend the autoregressive decoding paradigm to a multi-branch drafting procedure so LLMs can decode multiple tokens simultaneously in one forward propagation, roughly doubling end-to-end throughput

notes: Multi-branch self-drafting changes the decoding procedure so multiple simultaneous drafts validate tokens within one forward pass, the core decoding strategy contribution.

general: We choose to optimize the input data at the fine-grained level of tokens, cleverly preserving the original text structure.
Each action is a binary decision process to decide whether to retain a specific token information, and the agent learns token selection probabilities to refine the input.

notes: RTLIR learns to drop or keep tokens to refine LLM input, targeting token-level context management.

general: Title claims pruning large language models via Adaptive Sparse Trainer for semi-structured sparse models, and the abstract highlights feasibility of deploying highly compressed LLMs with distillation and extra initialization.
模型压缩: Abstract describes AST as a retraining framework learning optimal masks during weight updates for semi-structured sparsity and reports that LLaMA2-7B’s perplexity and zero-shot gap nearly closes while using under 0.4% of pretraining tokens and GPU hours, making compression the main lever.

notes: 核心在半结构稀疏训练与蒸馏，使 LLaMA2-7B 接近密集模型性能，强调模型压缩路径。

general: Generating CoT before answers boosts reasoning but the generated CoT is much longer than the desired answer, so C3oT compresses the original CoT into a shorter one while maintaining key information and interpretability to reduce decoding costs.
解码策略优化: C3oT introduces conditioned training and inference that learn relationships between long and short CoT and generate shorter CoT, cutting CoT length by over 50% without compromising effectiveness, directly reducing decoding overhead.

notes: CoT compression framework explicitly reshapes the decoding process to emit shorter reasoning chains while preserving accuracy.

general: Title describes dynamic-width speculative beam decoding aimed at LLM inference.
解码策略优化: Abstract highlights the autoregressive nature of LLMs makes inference slow and costly, motivating a decoding-focused optimization.

notes: Speculative decoding is the central method for speeding autoregressive LLM inference.

general: Serving LLMs requires substantial memory because the KV cache grows with sequence length.
上下文与缓存优化: QJL quantizes the KV cache to 3 bits while cutting memory usage and keeping accuracy.

notes: QJL couples a Johnson-Lindenstrauss sketch with sign-bit quantization to avoid storing per-block constants, offering an unbiased inner-product estimator with a lightweight CUDA kernel.

general: CSR converts the dense Key-Value cache tensor into sparse indexes and weights, making the KV cache more memory-efficient for inference in long-context LLMs.
上下文与缓存优化: The abstract highlights CSR’s sparse representation of the KV cache plus NeuralDict’s learned dictionary so that the KV cache footprint shrinks without harming functionality.

notes: The paper’s main contribution is reducing KV cache memory pressure via sparse representations for LLM inference in memory-constrained settings.

上下文与缓存优化: 直接将整个代码仓库拼接进 prompt 会超出 Code LLM 的 context window，导致 completion 性能大幅下降。
Hierarchical Context Pruning 策略通过构造高质量的 completion prompt，使 prompt 长度保持在 8k tokens 左右（而整个仓库约 50k tokens），显著提升完成准确率和吞吐。

notes: HCP 是为长上下文管理/pruning 设计的，属于上下文与缓存的主优化杠杆。

上下文与缓存优化: Prompt compression … reduce computational costs and alleviate the burden on language models when processing lengthy prompts.

notes: 聚焦长上下文 prompt 压缩来缓解 LLM 处理成本，符合上下文与缓存优化标签唯一需求。

general: LLM serving is facing sustainability pressure from expensive modern hardware, so the talk traverses contributions on modularized LLM architecture, in-storage sustainable computing, and reliable serving to better reuse existing resources.

Deploying and executing LLMs on broad serving platforms is challenging due to resource limits, therefore exploring how to use outdated hardware collectively improves sustainability, efficiency, and reliability.
系统与调度优化: Wide usage of LLM serving at edge hardware, personal devices, and enterprise infrastructures motivates recycling outdated and resource-constrained GPUs via modularized architectures and in-storage computing to relieve resource pressure.

Particularly emphasizing modularized LLM architecture, in-storage sustainable computing, and reliable serving suggests the main lever is improving how LLM services are scheduled and hosted across constrained hardware.

notes: Talk centers on reusing outdated GPUs and modular components to make LLM serving more sustainable and reliable.

模型压缩: Compression-aware computing integrates compression techniques like sparsification, quantization, and low-rank decomposition to enhance efficiency while preserving performance.
general: The talk focuses on customizing large-scale generative AI models for cost-effective, resource-constrained devices by making them aware of their compressed states.

notes: Framework emphasizes compression to make generative models scalable and accessible across constrained hardware.

模型压缩: leverage modern accelerators, specifically low-precision and sparsity, to significantly speed up inference while preserving accuracy.
general: Probabilistic inference is a fundamental challenge spanning approximate Bayesian inference to generative AI.

notes: Talk centers on accelerating probabilistic generative-model inference via low-precision/sparsity compute, making model compression the main optimization lever.

general: Selective Expert Guidance for Effective and Diverse Exploration in Reinforcement Learning of LLMs frames the work as improving reinforcement learning for large language models.

general: In-context image editing aims to modify images based on a contextual sequence comprising text and previously generated images. Existing methods typically depend on task-specific pipelines and expert models (e.g., segmentation and inpainting) to curate training data. In this work, we explore whether an in-context image editing model can be learned directly from videos. We introduce a scalable approach to annotate videos as interleaved multimodal sequences.

The paper introduces GLoW, a framework leveraging dual-scale textual world memory to keep a trajectory frontier globally and guide local trial-and-error exploration, achieving state-of-the-art LLM agent performance on Jericho with 100–800× fewer environment interactions, which shows the work centers on LLM-world-model exploration rather than any of the six optimization levers. notes: Optimizes KV cache handling for long-context LLM serving to boost throughput without accuracy loss.

general: SpinQuant incorporates learned rotation matrices for optimal quantized network accuracy on Transformer LLMs, reducing the accuracy gap to full precision while quantizing weights, activations, and the KV cache.
The method achieves tight zero-shot reasoning performance with 4-bit quantization of weights, activations, and KV cache on LLaMA-2/3 models, surpassing other quantized LLM baselines.
模型压缩: SpinQuant narrows the zero-shot reasoning accuracy gap to full precision to 2.9 points on LLaMA-2 7B with 4-bit quantization and outperforms prior quantization approaches such as LLM-QAT and SmoothQuant.

notes: The paper optimizes LLM inference by learned rotations that reduce quantization error across weights, activations, and KV cache, firmly positioning the contribution under model compression.

general: Large-language-model inference with long contexts often produces key–value (KV) caches whose footprint exceeds the capacity of high-bandwidth memory on a GPU.
上下文与缓存优化: Prior LLM inference frameworks such as vLLM mitigate this pressure by swapping KV cache pages to host DRAM, while HiFC introduces a DRAM-free swapping scheme that stores KV pages in pseudo-SLC regions of SSDs and enables direct transfers between SSD and GPU to bypass host DRAM.

general: Context caching improves serving performance by reusing Key-Value (KV) vectors, the intermediate representations of tokens that are repeated across requests.

Existing context caching requires exact prefix matches across requests, limiting reuse cases in settings such as few-shot learning and retrieval-augmented generation, where immutable content remains unchanged across requests but is preceded by varying prefixes.
上下文与缓存优化: Authors focus on position-independent caching to reuse KV vectors even when prior prefixes change, highlighting context caching as the core serving optimization for complex prompts.

general: NANOMIND decomposes LMMs into modular bricks (vision, audio, language) and maps each onto the ideal accelerator while coordinating shared memory with a token-aware buffer manager, enabling a battery-powered device to run LLaVA and LLaMA-3 offline with higher throughput and energy efficiency than prior implementations. general: Generative planners based on flow matching (FM) produce high-quality paths in a single or a few ODE steps, but their sampling dynamics lack formal safety guarantees, so SafeFlowMatcher couples FM with control barrier functions (CBFs).

any4 is a learned 4-bit weight quantization solution for LLMs providing arbitrary numeric representations without requiring pre-processing of weights or activations.

general: Diffusion models can effectively generate high-quality images. However, as they scale, rising memory demands and higher latency pose substantial deployment challenges. In this work, we aim to accelerate diffusion models by quantizing their weights and activations to 4 bits. At such an aggressive level, both weights and activations are highly sensitive, where existing post-training quantization methods like smoothing become insufficient.

To overcome this limitation, we propose SVDQuant, a new 4-bit quantization paradigm. Different from smoothing, which redistributes outliers between weights and activations, our approach absorbs these outliers using a low-rank branch. We first consolidate the outliers by shifting them from activations to weights. Then, we use a high-precision, low-rank branch to take in the weight outliers with Singular Value Decomposition (SVD), while a low-bit quantized branch handles the residuals. This process eases the quantization on both sides.

Extensive experiments on SDXL, PixArt-Σ, and FLUX.1 validate the effectiveness of SVDQuant in preserving image quality. We reduce the memory usage for the 12B FLUX.1 models by 3.5×, achieving 3.0× speedup over the 4-bit weight-only quantization (W4A16) baseline on the 16GB laptop 4090 GPU with INT4 precision.

general: Bayesian optimization is used to incorporate expert priors via DynMeanBO’s dynamic mean decay, aiming for robust convergence across acquisition functions (title+abstract).

notes: DynMeanBO introduces a dynamic decay on the Gaussian process prior mean to balance expert guidance with standard BO exploration and generalizes to multiple acquisition functions without extra cost.

general: Title/abstract describe a new PIC task/benchmark and a post-training framework to improve long-form faithfulness without centering on decoding, context/cache, system scheduling, operator/kernel, structure, or compression optimizations.

notes: Paper studies long-form grounded generation and trains PIC-LM for faithfulness, so it does not introduce one of the six specified operational optimizations.

general: Title and abstract analyze Transformer training dynamics and implicit regularization to induce cause-only predictions, which fits a general machine-learning investigation rather than a specific infrastructure or model class.
negative: Abstract lacks any mention of decoding/control-flow strategies, cache/context handling, serving/scheduling, low-level kernels, structural inference tweaks, or model compression, so no preference label applies.

general: DualMap is a dual-mapping scheduling strategy for distributed LLM serving that enables cache affinity and load balancing.
系统与调度优化: DualMap maps each request to two candidate instances with independent hash functions and selects based on system state, adding SLO-aware routing, hotspot-aware rebalancing, and lightweight dual-hash-ring scaling.

notes: 专注于 LLM serving 请求调度在缓存亲和力与负载均衡之间的权衡。

general: KV cache quantization can improve Large Language Models (LLMs) inference throughput and latency in long contexts and large batch-size scenarios while preserving LLMs effectiveness.

notes: 论文通过 KV cache 量化直接优化上下文缓存，显式验证了性能与效果的权衡。

general: Abstract describes first using warm-up supervised fine-tuning and then RL with an entropy-based long-short reasoning fusion strategy to let agentic LLMs automatically scale reasoning length for tool use, improving accuracy while cutting token cost by ~81%—no mention of cache/context, decoding, system scheduling, kernel, structural, or compression optimizations seen.

Introduction and preliminary sections frame the contribution as regulating RL exploration via decoupled entropy constraints to overcome reasoning collapse and inefficiency in test-time scaling for tool use, reinforcing that the paper’s main lever is RL entropy control rather than any of the six preference optimization categories.

notes: Paper focuses on RL entropy-constrained scaling for tool use, so none of the specified preference optimizations apply; hence negative tier.

general: SALS将KV cache投影到低秩latent space后只对关键token进行稀疏重建，避免了完整KV cache重构带来的开销并保持高精度。
作者在LLaMA2-7b-chat、Mistral-7b，以及RULER-128k benchmark上验证了该框架，报告了6.4倍KV cache压缩和在4K序列上5.7倍的attention算子加速。
上下文与缓存优化: 通过latent space的低秩projection与RoPE-free查询交互完成稀疏token选择，SALS直接以压缩KV cache为核心目标，不依赖系统调度或模型结构变更。

notes: ['主贡献聚焦KV cache的压缩与稀疏token重建，显式优化上下文缓存开销。']

general: Abstract centers on a predictive differential training framework (Koopman-guided weight prediction, masking high-fidelity predictions, and an acceleration scheduler) to speed up SGD-like optimizers across general neural networks, without emphasizing any of the six preference optimization levers.

notes: No single preferred optimization label applies; the main contribution refines training dynamics rather than decoding, caching, system, kernel, structure, or compression optimizations.

general: Title/abstract describe debugging Concept Bottleneck Models via a removal-and-retraining loop (CBDebug) that turns concept-level feedback into auxiliary labels to mitigate spurious correlations, with no single optimization focus from the six preference tags.

notes: Framework centers on interpretable debugging (concept removal plus retraining) to reduce shortcut reliance rather than serving/caching/decoding/kernel/model compression efforts.

general: Paper derives identifiability conditions, efficient influence function, and optimal covariate adjustment for weighted controlled direct effect estimation in fairness/mediation contexts, without proposing new systems or optimization heuristics.

notes: Focused on statistical estimation for causal direct effects rather than infrastructure or serving/decoding improvements.

general: Recent AI trends aim to align models to human-centric objectives by modeling human decisions and judgments.

They take an axiomatic approach to learn cognitively faithful decision processes from pairwise comparisons, building structured models that process features with learned rules and fixed aggregation to mirror human reasoning.
They validate the approach on kidney allocation tasks, showing the models match or surpass prior human pairwise decision-making models.
Adaptive KV updates for diffusion LLMs reduce redundant recomputation across denoising steps.
Elastic-Cache achieves consistent decoding speedups with minimal accuracy loss on GSM8K, longer sequences, and HumanEval.
上下文与缓存优化: Elastic-Cache decides when/where to refresh caches via attention-aware drift tests and depth-aware schedules, reusing shallow-layer and off-window MASK caches to minimize redundant KV recomputation.

notes: Focused on KV cache reuse to accelerate decoding for diffusion LLMs.

general: Large Language Models (LLMs) have demonstrated exceptional performance ... yet their massive size makes serving them inefficient and costly.
ProxSparse transforms the rigid, non-differentiable mask selection process into a smoother optimization procedure, allowing gradual mask exploration with flexibility.
模型压缩: Semi-structured pruning has emerged as an effective method for model acceleration ... We present ProxSparse, a learning-based framework for mask selection enabled by regularized optimization ... Our extensive evaluations ... show that ProxSparse consistently outperforms previously proposed semi-structured mask selection methods with significant improvement, demonstrating the effectiveness of our learned approach towards semi-structured pruning.

notes: Learning-based semi-structured pruning for LLMs via ProxSparse regularized mask selection without additional weight updates; global feedback drives mask optimization.

general: Title and abstract center on conformal prediction, robust uncertainty quantification, and uncertain imputation for corrupted labels, not on any inference or infrastructure optimizations tied to the six preference labels.
negative: No explicit decoding, context/cache, system scheduling, operator/kernel, model-structure inference, or model-compression optimization is proposed or validated; the work analyses statistical guarantees and introduces UI for label imputation instead.
